case_title: KAM PING CHU VS. FRANCISCA RAMOS

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,025.00 FILED BY CHU, KAM PING LEE, SUNNY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, FRANCISCA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,025.00 FILED BY CHU, KAM PING AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, FRANCISCA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU, KAM PING LEE, SUNNY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMOS, FRANCISCA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, KAM PING AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, FRANCISCA
DECLARATION OF KAM PING CHU , ADDING A PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, KAM PING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHU, KAM PING
